name: Punnett Square Genetics Activity
description: Create a 4-page interactive flipchart for a high school genetics lesson on Punnett Squares. The flipchart should include an introductory page titled 'Punnett Squares' explaining 'dominant' and 'recessive' alleles for a 'Bb x Bb' (Brown vs White fur) cross. A subsequent page must feature a 2x2 grid illustrating the parent labels and resulting offspring genotypes for the Bb x Bb cross. Include a results page titled 'Results' or 'Ratios' showing the correct genotypic and phenotypic ratios for the cross. Conclude with a 'Practice' page presenting a 'BB' x 'bb' cross with empty boxes for student practice. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/punnett_square_genetics.flipchart.
